title: Beau
compiled_truth: Beau is an external contact at [Layfam](companies/layfam). Over the corpus period (2000-05-16 to 2002-01-17), Beau sent 13 and received 31 emails, totalling 44 interactions. Top correspondents: [Kenneth Lay](people/kenneth-lay) (11), [Klay](people/klay) (2), [Lay](people/lay) (2), [Linda Lay](people/linda-lay) (2), [Lay Vittor](people/lay-vittor) (1).
